A bounty hunter (Glenn Ford) faces his son's killers with help from the son (Michael Burns) of an outlaw he has killed.
programme.title: Santee

programme.desc: A poor Chicago secretary (Diana Ross) takes the fast lane to fame as a model and a fashion designer.
programme.title: Mahogany

programme.desc: Railway police take action when kidnappers choose their busy station as the drop-off point for their ransom money.
programme.title: Union Station

programme.desc: A Broadway star does a show about life during World War I while his son does one in World War II to boost a soldier's morale.
programme.title: This Is the Army

programme.desc: A snooty socialite (Katharine Hepburn) fights with her ex-husband (Cary Grant) and flirts with a reporter (James Stewart).
programme.title: The Philadelphia Story

programme.desc: A barmaid, a Bostonian and an Indian (Rita Gam) flirt with an artist (Scott Brady) in 18th-century upstate New York.
programme.title: Mohawk

programme.desc: Based on the story by Louisa May Alcott. The four March sisters forge unbreakable emotional ties during the Civil War.
programme.title: Little Women

programme.desc: S05 E21 — Lucy and Tennessee Ernie Ford Lucy tries for the business of a millionaire country-music star.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: An astronaut and his team crash on a world ruled by intelligent, talking simians who treat humans like animals.
programme.title: Planet of the Apes

programme.desc: A paratrooper's (Dean Martin) goofy buddy (Jerry Lewis) joins him on base and makes a mockery of maneuvers.
programme.title: Jumping Jacks

programme.desc: Rejected by a young woman (Hayley Mills) in London, a scientist (John Hurt) retreats to Antarctica to study the penguin.
programme.title: Mr. Forbush and the Penguins

programme.desc: A Korean War hero's (Laurence Harvey) commanding officer (Frank Sinatra) discovers he and his platoon were brainwashed.
programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate

programme.desc: A pet deer changes a boy (Claude Jarman Jr.) and his parents (Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman), pioneering farmers in Florida after the Civil War.
programme.title: The Yearling

programme.desc: International swindlers are diverted from their sinister dealings when an explosion wrecks the ship they are aboard.
programme.title: Beat the Devil

programme.desc: After a laboratory courtship, the Polish scientist (Greer Garson) and her French husband (Walter Pidgeon) discover radium in 1898.
programme.title: Madame Curie

programme.desc: A couple (Dick Van Dyke, Debbie Reynolds) break up after 15 years of marriage, then get back together as the easy way out.
programme.title: Divorce American Style

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: The frontiersman (Bruce Bennett) leads settlers to Kentucky, where he makes peace with a Shawnee chief (Lon Chaney).
programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer

programme.desc: Stan (Stan Laurel) and Ollie (Oliver Hardy) join the Foreign Legion and wind up scheduled for a firing squad.
programme.title: The Flying Deuces

programme.desc: A racetrack tout (Bob Hope) has a month to pay back the sum a gangster (Lloyd Nolan) lost on a bad tip.
programme.title: The Lemon Drop Kid

programme.desc: An exile (John Richardson) from a hostile tribe woos a woman (Raquel Welch) from a gentle tribe amid monsters and an earthquake.
programme.title: One Million Years B.C.

programme.desc: Allied commandos (Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn) try to knock out a Nazi fortress over the Aegean.
programme.title: The Guns of Navarone

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: The Elena & Natalia Show
programme.desc: We're twins, Elena & Natalia Maranian, and are passionate about sharing the love of Jesus through media. Together, we host and produce our talk show, The Elena & Natalia Show in which we have conversations about Jesus, life, and love centered on the beauty and truth of God’s Word. We are also honored to serve at our family's TV network and media ministry, International Christian Family Network, Inc. where we hosted our former talk show, New Generation.

programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. Rodney and his wife Adonica pastor a church in Tampa, Florida, The River at Tampa Bay, which they founded in 1996 and which now has 3000 members. These three things have remained constant since the church’s inception…dynamic praise and worship, anointed preaching and teaching of the Word, and powerful demonstrations of the Holy Spirit and power.
